title: Update items directly from the Gantt View - Pop Up View

posts.author: Soren3 (Soren)
posts.cookedHtml:
Update items directly from the Gantt View

What is the expected behavior of Subitems in the Gantt Pop Up view?

Current situation is that Subitems are visible but I am only able to view them as a total number, however I can update all other fields (Due Date/Notes etc):

image1196×351 36.3 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Soren3! I am afraid what you’re experiencing is expected behaviour. The subitems will appear as a total, and not as individual columns within the item card pop up. I will be sure to share your feedback with our team internally
